title: Monthly Results (verified scoreboard template)
_note: DRAFT v2 (#MonthlyResults). Monthly aggregate scoreboard — bare WIN/LOSS counts only, NEVER a fixed win-rate %. Template: fill every [..] from the public log on month-end, then set ready=true. Never invent numbers.
body:
📊 #MonthlyResults — [Month]

Signals posted: [N]
By type:
• Scalp → WINS [w] / LOSSES [l]
• Swing → WINS [w] / LOSSES [l]
• [type] → WINS [w] / LOSSES [l]

Best: LC-[####] [+R]R   ·   Worst: LC-[####] [−R]R

Net read: [honest qualitative line — NOT a fixed win-rate %]

Every trade above is in our public log with exchange screenshots. Check for yourself.

#MonthlyResults
